chosen_action.title: TIMEWELL benchmark inclusion request
chosen_action.target: TIMEWELL benchmark — AI Coding Tools Compared [Latest 2026]

why_this_action.summary: Codeberg adoption is still flat, the due ai-for-developers follow-up already shipped in the current review window, and TIMEWELL was a fresh unsent high-intent comparison target with a live editorial email contact.

expected_outcome: A new comparison-page mention, maintainer reply, or qualified backlink that sends evaluators to the Codeberg-first Ralph Workflow repo.

measurement_window.success_metric: Maintainer reply, benchmark mention, or attributable qualified repo inspection / Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If there is no reply or public mention signal by the review checkpoint, stop reusing the same general comparison email angle and switch the next publisher-contact slot to a different untouched target.
